error_signature: Cannot GET / in the app endpoint
title: Cannot access n8n app endpoint due to cold start
symptom: When trying to access the n8n app endpoint, the user receives a 'Cannot GET /' message. This occurs due to the service taking too long to spin up.
not_this_if: Min instances set to 1 or more
root_cause: Cloud Run services can experience cold starts when there are no minimum instances running. If the min_instance setting is set to 0, the service may take longer to respond, leading to connection issues.
fix_steps: Go to your Cloud Run service settings
agent_instruction: Set the min_instance of your Cloud Run service to 1 to avoid cold starts.
